scope.research_question: What is the current evidence landscape for tadalafil and cognitive performance in healthy adults, especially mostly healthy men age 30 to 50?

summary: Created a submitted baseline-review bundle for tadalafil cognition in healthy adults. Targeted searching found no direct tadalafil healthy-adult cognitive-enhancement source, so the staged claim is bounded to insufficient direct evidence and supported by indirect tadalafil CSVD/SVD trials plus one adjacent healthy-adult vardenafil source.
next_actions: Run evidence appraisal for the submitted cognition bundle.
Run a safety/interactions baseline review before publishing broad off-label tadalafil summaries.
Consider staging the ETLAS-2 cognitive sub-study in a revision or in the MCI/cognitive-decline review.
